reason: Bare unprovenanced analysis facts in the bound ||S||<=2||Phi||+||I||=3. The induced-operator-norm triangle inequality ||2Phi-I||<=2||Phi||+||I|| and the value ||I||=1 for the identity MAP (note: ||I|| here is the operator norm of the identity endomorphism, not the order-unit norm of the element I) are used with no refs/ citation. Per project rule 'there are no standard facts', these need either a ground-truth source or derivation from one. (Severity minor: both facts are genuinely true and standard, so the gap is provenance-formal rather than a mathematical error; the load-bearing issue is the separate context challenge on ||Phi||=1.)
